title: aspidoglossum carinatum
intro: Aspidoglossum carinatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the "horned tongue" due to its distinctive shape. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aspidoglossum carinatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
